name: Safari AI
one_liner: Safari AI uses computer vision and Vision AI to help enterprises auto-measure and optimize physical operations in real time using their existing IP cameras.
key_products: Vision AI Engine (real-time physical operations monitoring)

ambiguities: Founded year conflict: company About page suggests 2022 re-branding/co-founding, while PitchBook, Tracxn, and LeadIQ list 2018 (originally as curbFlow); 2018 used as founding year of the legal entity.

Total funding conflict: most sources (PitchBook, LeadIQ, Crunchbase) cite $8M raised in Nov 2018 seed round; LeadIQ AI-generated text and CBInsights mention a Series A in Feb 2023 and up to $13M total, but these are unconfirmed by primary sources.
HQ conflict: PitchBook/Tracxn list New York, NY; Crunchbase lists Miami, FL; 'New York, NY' used as primary registered address per LeadIQ street address.
